experiment_4.Task: Run an ATAC-seq chromatin accessibility workflow in Galaxy on paired-end reads and report key workflow execution details.
experiment_4.Prompt: I have paired-end ATAC-seq files and want to analyze chromatin accessibility in Galaxy, but I do not know which workflow is appropriate. Please choose a suitable Galaxy workflow, run it, and for reproducibility tell me what type of analysis the workflow performs, what input structure it expects, what final coverage-style artifact it produces, and how many tool steps are in the workflow.
